name: Sanara MedTech Inc.
summary: Sanara MedTech Inc. is a medical technology company focused on developing and commercializing products in the wound care and surgical sectors. The company develops, manufactures, distributes, markets, and sells medical products, some of which incorporate licensed third-party technologies. Sanara operates in competitive healthcare markets and relies on clinical acceptance, proprietary rights, and distribution networks to drive revenue growth.
